hero.title: VISHWAKARMA
hero.subtitle: KNOWLEDGE CENTRE
hero.description: Preserving the divine craftsmanship of the Five Creators. Connect with thousands of registered artisans worldwide.

manu.name: SRI MANU BRAHMA
manu.desc: The primordial fire. Manu Brahma bestowed the knowledge of metallurgy, forging the tools of civilization.

maya.name: SRI MAYA BRAHMA
maya.desc: Master of sacred geometry. Maya Brahma crafted the intricate woodworks, chariots, and structures of the epics.

thwashta.name: SRI TVASHTAR BRAHMA
thwashta.desc: The master of non-ferrous alloys. Tvashtar Brahma crafted divine vessels, intricate gears, and weapons.

shilpi.name: SRI SHILPI BRAHMA
shilpi.desc: The eternal sculptor. Shilpi Brahma bestowed the science of Vastu and divine stone artistry.

vishwajna.name: SRI VISHVAJNA BRAHMA
vishwajna.desc: The luminous jeweler. Vishvajna Brahma crafts the solar brilliance and divine ornaments.

about.title: About Vishwa Karma Knowledge Centre
about.heroDesc: Dedicated to the recognition, skill upgradation, and holistic support of traditional artisans and craftspeople in South India.
about.description: Dedicated to the preservation and promotion of Vishwakarma heritage, craftsmanship, and ancient technical wisdom. Our centre serves as a hub for learning, community gathering, and spiritual growth.
about.mission: Empowering our community through knowledge, education, and the celebration of our diverse traditions and expert skills.
about.card1Desc: Preserving the sacred geometry and technical excellence of the universe's master architect.
about.card2Desc: Documenting and sharing the technical knowledge found in the Sthapatya Veda and scriptures.
about.card3Desc: Celebrating generations of precision, craftsmanship, and vocational mastery in our community.
about.telanganaDesc: With over 2.8 lakh registrations and 85+ active training centers across 26 districts, we are leading the transformation of traditional trades in Telangana.
about.andhraDesc: Deeply rooted in districts like Konaseema and Vizianagaram, focusing on specialized training for Malakaar, Washermen, and other essential heritage trades.
about.benefit1Desc: PM Vishwakarma Certificate and ID Card for every artisan.
about.benefit2Desc: Basic and Advanced skill training with ₹500/day stipend.
about.benefit4Desc: Collateral-free loans up to ₹3 Lakh at 5% interest.
about.joinDesc: We invite artisans across all 18 traditional trades to join the Knowledge Centre and build a prosperous future together.
about.authority: Institutional Authority under VKC Governance Board

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Join us in celebrating our culture and traditions.

footer.description: Empowering the Vishwakarma community through technical excellence and cultural preservation.

hero.subtitle: "Documenting the structural, spiritual, and technical mastery of the Vishwakarma lineage."

roots.title: The Origins: Roots in the Vedas
roots.excerpt: He who is the world-architect, whose eye is everywhere, whose mouth is everywhere, whose arm is everywhere, whose foot is everywhere...
roots.description: For over five millennia, the Vishwabrahmins have served as the architects of civilization, translating spiritual geometry into the physical wonders of our world.

iron-pillar.title: The Iron Pillar of Delhi
iron-pillar.shortDesc: A 1,600-year-old metallurgical wonder that has not rusted despite being exposed to the elements.

deepContext.culturalPride: The Manu craftsmen forged this pillar as an eternal testament to their metallurgical sovereignty, intended to stand longer than empires.
deepContext.technical: High phosphorus content and the absence of sulfur/manganese created a dynamic protective passive layer (misawite), a feat of ancient material science.
deepContext.inclusivity: Built during the Gupta era, it signifies a transition where artisan knowledge became central to state identity, inviting all lineages to witness technical perfection.

wootz-steel.title: Wootz Steel (Damascus Blades)
wootz-steel.shortDesc: High-carbon steel pioneered in South India, exported globally for its unmatched edge and wave patterns.

deepContext.culturalPride: The secret of Wootz was the pride of Southern Indian Manu guilds, producing blades that could cut through silk and armor alike.
deepContext.technical: Crucible steel process that naturally formed carbon nanotubes within the steel matrix, providing both flexibility and extreme hardness.
deepContext.inclusivity: These blades were the first global luxury good, exported from the Deccan to the Middle East, symbolizing Indian engineering's global reach.

furnaces.title: The Furnaces of Kodumanal
furnaces.shortDesc: Ancient industrial-scale iron production centers that supplied the world during the Sangam era.

deepContext.culturalPride: Kodumanal represents the industrial discipline of our ancestors, who turned simple earth into the world's finest steel through controlled fire.
deepContext.technical: High-temperature crucible techniques that allowed for precise carbon control, unmatched in the ancient world.
deepContext.inclusivity: These centers were hubs of trade and social interaction, where various communities worked alongside the master blacksmiths.

ramappa.title: Ramappa: Sandbox Technology
ramappa.shortDesc: The structural foundation that uses 'sandbox' technology to absorb seismic tremors.

deepContext.culturalPride: Maya architects designed Ramappa to be immortal, using engineering to defy the very earth beneath it.
deepContext.technical: The foundation is filled with sand that acts as an earthquake absorber, combined with floating bricks to reduce top-heavy loads.
deepContext.inclusivity: The temple is an 'inclusive miracle', standing firm through centuries of invasions and natural disasters as a symbol of structural unity.

puri-rathas.title: The Chariots of Puri
puri-rathas.shortDesc: Massive wooden Rathas built every year using zero metal nails, relying entirely on ancient locking joints.

deepContext.culturalPride: Every year, Maya craftsmen recreate these massive chariots to demonstrate that tradition is a living, breathing science.
deepContext.technical: Complex wood-on-wood tension joints that can support dozens of tons of weight without a single drop of adhesive or metal.
deepContext.inclusivity: The construction involves the entire community in the Rath Yatra, making it the world's most inclusive mobile architectural festival.

padmanabhapuram.title: Padmanabhapuram Palace
padmanabhapuram.shortDesc: Commonly cited as the world's finest wooden architecture, featuring intricate natural temperature regulation.

deepContext.culturalPride: This palace is the height of Maya domestic architecture, where wood is treated with the same reverence as stone or gold.
deepContext.technical: Strategic ventilation and wood porosity controls that keep the interiors cool even in the peaking tropical heat of Kerala.
deepContext.inclusivity: Designed with large open halls for public assembly, promoting transparency between the ruler and the ruled.

hampi-musical.title: Hampi: Musical Pillars
hampi-musical.shortDesc: Stone pillars designed to resonate like brass bells when tapped, a pinnacle of sonic architecture.

deepContext.culturalPride: Twashta craftsmen proved that stone is not silent; it is a musical instrument if understood with geological precision.
deepContext.technical: Selection of 'resonant granite' and hollow-carving to specific geological frequencies that match the Indian classical music scale.
deepContext.inclusivity: These pillars were used for community performances, making the very temple structure a participant in public music and joy.

chola-nataraja.title: The Chola Nataraja (Bronze)
chola-nataraja.shortDesc: Recognized globally as a masterpiece of bronze casting, balancing movement physics with spiritual pose.

deepContext.culturalPride: The Nataraja is the Twashta signature—a perfect marriage of atomic-level metallurgy and cosmic philosophy.
deepContext.technical: The 'Maduchista Vidhana' (lost wax) process allowed for a single, seamless bronze pour that defies the fragility of its thin limbs.
deepContext.inclusivity: This icon traveled the world, becoming a universal symbol of the cycle of life, transcending all cultural and linguistic barriers.

aranmula-mirror.title: The Aranmula Metal Mirror
aranmula-mirror.shortDesc: A secret alloy of copper and tin from Kerala. Unlike glass mirrors, this eliminates secondary reflections.

deepContext.culturalPride: Hand-polished for months, these mirrors are the only ones in the world that show the 'true' reflection without glass distortion.
deepContext.technical: A precise secret ratio of copper and tin that creates an front-surface reflection at the molecular level.
deepContext.inclusivity: Each mirror is considered a divine heirloom, passed down through generations regardless of wealth or status.

kailasa-temple.title: Kailasa: Top-Down Monolith
kailasa-temple.shortDesc: The world's largest monolithic structure, carved from the top down out of a single mountain.

deepContext.culturalPride: Shilpi architects didn't build this temple; they 'released' it from the mountain, proving that faith can move mountains—literally.
deepContext.technical: Removal of over 200,000 tons of rock without a single structural error. Any mistake would have been unfixable as it was a subtraction process.
deepContext.inclusivity: A massive collaboration of Shilpi guilds from across India, blending Northern and Southern styles into a unified masterpiece.

konark-wheel.title: Konark: Solar Calibration
konark-wheel.shortDesc: The 24 wheels are hyper-precise sundials that calculate time by observing shadows.

deepContext.culturalPride: At Konark, the sun itself is the witness to Shilpi precision. The wheels are the 'clocks of the heavens'.
deepContext.technical: The placement of spokes and the central axle allow for time measurement accurate to within 2 minutes by purely geometric means.
deepContext.inclusivity: The Sun Temple was a center for astronomical learning, open to scholars and devotees from every corner of the world.

madanikas-belur.title: The Madanikas of Belur
madanikas-belur.shortDesc: Detailed sculptures showing fingernails and moving jewelry chains, sculpted from hard soapstone.

deepContext.culturalPride: Legend says the sculptor Jakanachari proved that beauty is a mathematical certainty. These are the finest lithic figures ever made.
deepContext.technical: Undercutting techniques in Chloritic Schist (soapstone) that allowed for stone jewelry that actually moves when touched.
deepContext.inclusivity: The Madanikas celebrate the divine feminine in all its forms, representing a period of extreme social and artistic liberation.

mangala-sutra.title: The Sacred Mangala Sutra
mangala-sutra.shortDesc: The spiritual bond of marriage, crafted with sacred geometry to protect the union.

deepContext.culturalPride: The Vishvajnya craftsman infuses every bead of gold with a prayer, turning an ornament into a sacred shield for the family.
deepContext.technical: Use of specific bead weights and gold purity that resonate with bio-energetic principles of the wearer.
deepContext.inclusivity: The Mangala Sutra is the universal thread of the Indian family, binding diverse cultures under a single sign of love and commitment.

thanjavur-nakshi.title: Temple Jewellery of Thanjavur
thanjavur-nakshi.shortDesc: Divine iconography crafted with 'Kunda' (pure gold foil) to create 3D divine figures.

deepContext.culturalPride: To dorn the gods with gold is the highest form of service for a Vishvajnya, reflecting the inner radiance of the soul.
deepContext.technical: The Nakshi technique involves hammering gold into a three-dimensional form from the reverse, requiring extreme miniature precision.
deepContext.inclusivity: Originally for deities, this art form became the pride of every bride, democratizing the 'divine look' for all.

golden-vimana.title: The Golden Vimana of Shrines
golden-vimana.shortDesc: Gilding the heavens – the massive gold-plated spires that adorn India's most sacred temple sanctums.

deepContext.culturalPride: The Golden Vimana is a beacon of hope, a Vishvajnya's way of making the divine visible from miles away.
deepContext.technical: Layering of gold foil over copper sheets with such durability that they withstand centuries of weathering.
deepContext.inclusivity: Regardless of who enters the temple, the golden spire (Kalasham) offers a blessing to all who look upon it from afar.

secrets_section.title: Ancient Science & Material Precision
secrets_section.subtitle: Moving beyond aesthetic admiration to understand the structural logic of the Pancha Brahma.

ramappa_science.title: The Floating Brick Technology
ramappa_science.description: Vishwabrahmins engineered lightweight bricks that float on water, significantly reducing the load on the foundation and allowing the temple to withstand high-magnitude earthquakes for 800+ years.

hampi_acoustics.title: Geological Sound Resonance
hampi_acoustics.description: The 56 musical pillars emit distinct musical notes when tapped. This was achieved by selecting specific granite types and hollow-carving them to precise geological resonant frequencies.

konark_precision.title: Astronomical Time Calibration
konark_precision.description: The 24 wheels of the chariot are not just decorative; they are hyper-precise sundials that can calculate time down to the minute by observing the shadow of the central axle.

wootz_metallurgy.title: Crucible Nanotechnology
wootz_metallurgy.description: Forged at extremely high temperatures in sealed crucibles with organic fluxes, Wootz steel naturally forms carbon nanotubes, achieving unprecedented hardness and flexibility.

misawite_passivation.title: Atmospheric Passivation
misawite_passivation.description: A 1,600-year-old iron pillar that defies rusting. High phosphorus content combined with a lack of sulfur formed a protective 'misawite' passive film, a masterpiece of ancient chemistry.

cta.title: Preserve the Legacy
cta.description: Are you a descendant of the Pancha Brahma lineage or a researcher of ancient engineering? Join our digital archive initiative.

founder.title: Brahmasri Vishwanadhula Pushpagiri
founder.subtitle: Founder & Chief, VKC
founder.quote: A visionary leader, restoring Vishwakarma's ancient grandeur.
founder.bio: From local streets to the national stage in Delhi, Brahmasri Vishwanadhula Pushpagiri's unwavering resolve has redefined empowerment for the community.
founder.padayatra: Completed a monumental 1,000+ km Padayatra in two phases, proving a life truly dedicated to the welfare of the Vishwakarma community.
founder.visionDesc: Restoring the legacy and tradition of five millennia.

donors.page_desc: Honor roll of our community supporters.
donors.title: The Pillar of Our Legacy
donors.subtitle: Every contribution builds the foundation for our next five millennia. Join the ranks of visionaries empowering the Vishwakarma community.

hub.seo_description: Connect with Vishwakarma professionals, community leaders, and mentors across the globe.
hub.title: The Unity Engine
hub.subtitle: A strategic ecosystem connecting our master artisans with the modern professional elite—doctors, engineers, and visionary leaders.

cta.title: Is Your Expertise Missing?
cta.subtitle: Whether you are a Doctor, Engineer, or Community Leader, your mentorship can shape the next generation of Vishwakarma talent.

professionals.title: Professional Mentors
professionals.subtitle: Find experts in your field for career guidance and technical support.

officials.title: Leaders & Representatives
officials.subtitle: Honoring those serving in high government and social positions.
officials.advocacy_subtitle: Join our legislative support group to track and advocate for Vishwakarma community rights and political representation.

matrimony.title: Refined Connections for the Vishwakarma Community
matrimony.subtitle: A discreet, membership-only portal designed to connect individuals sharing common heritage, values, and professional aspirations.

privacy.title: Absolute Privacy
privacy.desc: Photos and personal details are only visible to verified members.

backgrounds.title: Verified Backgrounds
backgrounds.desc: Every profile is cross-referenced with the VKC Membership Registry.

matches.title: Hand-Picked Matches
matches.desc: Strategic matchmaking based on educational and professional compatibility.

lock.title: Join to Access Full Profiles
lock.desc: For the safety and privacy of our community members, only registered VKC Identity Card holders can view full profiles and initiate contact.

education.title: Scholarships & Career Acceleration
education.subtitle: We bridge the gap between traditional heritage and modern professional success by providing the resources and guidance our students need to excel.

career_guidance.title: Looking for Career Guidance?
career_guidance.subtitle: Connect with our community mentors for one-on-one sessions on engineering, medicine, and administrative services preparation.
